controls.control_objective: To ensure be outsourced
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be outsourced

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of these directions either at the time of renewal or by april 10, 2026, whichever is earlier
controls.control_description:
Provided that a bank's existing Information Technology (IT) outsourcing agreements
regardless of whether they are due for renewal on or after the effective date of these
Directions shall comply with the provisions of these Directions either at the time of
renewal or by April 10, 2026, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of these directions either at the time of renewal or by april 10, 2026, whichever is earlier

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of these directions from the date of agreement itself
controls.control_description:
However, the bank's new IT
outsourcing agreements that come into force on or after the effective date of these
Directions, shall comply with the provisions of these Directions from the date of
agreement itself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of these directions from the date of agreement itself

controls.control_objective: To ensure be construed as permitting non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory requirements applicable to such arrangements
controls.control_description:
Provided further that nothing in the preceding proviso shall be construed as permitting
non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory
requirements applicable to such arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be construed as permitting non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory requirements applicable to such arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to scheduled commercial banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Scheduled Commercial Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to scheduled commercial banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure banking companies (other than small finance banks, local area banks, payments banks and regional rural banks), corresponding new banks, and the state
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of these Directions, 'Commercial Banks' means banking companies
(other than Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, Payments Banks and Regional
Rural Banks), corresponding new banks, and the State Bank of India, as defined
respectively under clauses (c), (da), and (nc) of section 5 of the Banking Regulation
Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to banking companies (other than small finance banks, local area banks, payments banks and regional rural banks), corresponding new banks, and the state

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read as a reference to the head office or controlling office that has oversight over the branch operations in india
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided that in respect of foreign banks operating in India through branch mode, any
reference to the Board or Board of Directors in these Directions shall be read as a
reference to the Head Office or Controlling Office that has oversight over the branch
operations in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be read as a reference to the head office or controlling office that has oversight over the branch operations in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to a 'comply or explain' approach, which shall allow them to deviate from any specific provision of those directions
controls.control_description:
Additionally, with respect to the Directions contained in Chapter
IV regarding outsourcing of IT services, foreign banks shall be subject to a 'comply or
explain' approach, which shall allow them to deviate from any specific provision of
those Directions, subject to examination and acceptance by RBI of a reasonably
justifiable explanation for such deviation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to a 'comply or explain' approach, which shall allow them to deviate from any specific provision of those directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) the provisions shall apply to outsourcing arrangements entered into by a bank with a service provider which may be either a member of
controls.control_description:
The scope of provisions contained in Chapter III shall be as under:
(1) The provisions shall apply to outsourcing arrangements entered into by a bank
with a service provider which may be either a member of the group / conglomerate
to which the bank belongs, or an unrelated party, which is located in India or
elsewhere, for outsourcing of financial services like applications processing (loan
origination, credit card), document processing, marketing and research,
supervision of loans, data processing and back office related activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) the provisions shall apply to outsourcing arrangements entered into by a bank with a service provider which may be either a member of

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to the applicable entities
controls.control_description:
Provided that for outsourced services relating to credit cards, the provisions set
out in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Credit Cards and Debit
Cards: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time,
shall also apply to the applicable entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to the applicable entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply, mutatis mutandis, to subcontracted activities
controls.control_description: (2) The provisions shall also apply, mutatis mutandis, to subcontracted activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply, mutatis mutandis, to subcontracted activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide for prior approval or consent of the bank before a service provider engages any subcontractor for all or part of the outsourced activity
controls.control_description:
For
this purpose, the outsourcing contract shall provide for prior approval or consent
of the bank before a service provider engages any subcontractor for all or part of
the outsourced activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide for prior approval or consent of the bank before a service provider engages any subcontractor for all or part of the outsourced activity

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the subcontracting arrangement and ensure that the same complies with the directions set out in chapter iii of these directions
controls.control_description:
Before granting such consent, the bank shall review the
subcontracting arrangement and ensure that the same complies with the
Directions set out in Chapter III of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the subcontracting arrangement and ensure that the same complies with the directions set out in chapter iii of these directions

controls.control_description: (3) The provisions shall not apply to outsourcing of:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to outsourcing of:

controls.control_description:
(iii) audit-related assignments to Chartered Accountant firms which shall continue
to be governed by the instructions and guidelines issued by the Department of
Supervision, RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to continue to be governed by the instructions and guidelines issued by the department of supervision, rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) the provisions shall apply to a bank's material outsourcing of it services, as defined in paragraph 53(2)
controls.control_description:
The scope of provisions contained in Chapter IV shall be as under:
(1) The provisions shall apply to a bank's material outsourcing of IT services, as
defined in paragraph 53(2).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) the provisions shall apply to a bank's material outsourcing of it services, as defined in paragraph 53(2)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as res - other commercial banks
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as res - other commercial banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure include agreements for a limited period
controls.control_description:
'Continuing basis' shall include agreements for a limited
period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include agreements for a limited period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as defined in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - concentration risk management) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time, for the
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as defined in the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - concentration risk management) directions, 2025, as amended from time to time, for the

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the information
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve Bank
of India Act, 1934 or the Information Technology Act, 2000 or the Companies Act,
2013 and Rules made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by RBI or as used in commercial parlance, as
the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the information

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place corresponding comprehensive board-approved outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 20 and paragraph 57, respe
controls.control_description:
A bank intending to outsource any of its financial or IT activities shall put in place
corresponding comprehensive Board-approved outsourcing policy, the coverage of
which is indicated in paragraph 20 and paragraph 57, respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place corresponding comprehensive board-approved outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 20 and paragraph 57, respe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for putting in place a framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective outsourcing arrangements, laying
controls.control_description:
The Board or a Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated, as
applicable for financial or IT outsourcing, shall be responsible for putting in place a
framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective
outsourcing arrangements, laying down appropriate approval authorities depending
on risks and materiality, and undertaking regular review.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for putting in place a framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective outsourcing arrangements, laying

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible, inter alia, for:
controls.control_description:
In respect of outsourcing of financial services,
(1) the Board, or a Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated,

controls.control_description:
In respect of outsourcing of IT services, the Board shall be responsible, inter alia,
for:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible, inter alia, for:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be owned or controlled by any director, key managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their relatives as indicated under the p
controls.control_description:
(iv) ensuring either by itself or through its Committee that there is no conflict of
interest arising out of third-party engagements, especially when permitting an
exception to the requirement that the service provider of outsourced services,
if not a group company, shall not be owned or controlled by any director, key
managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their
relatives as indicated under the proviso to paragraph 54 of these Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be owned or controlled by any director, key managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their relatives as indicated under the p

controls.control_description:

controls.control_objective: To ensure the service provider fail to perform the service
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the service provider fail to perform the service

controls.control_objective: To ensure be outsourced
controls.control_description: Activities that shall not be outsourced
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be outsourced

controls.control_objective: To ensure however not outsource core management functions including internal audit, compliance function, and decision-making functions like determining complian
controls.control_description:
A bank which chooses to outsource financial services shall however not outsource
core management functions including Internal Audit, compliance function, and
decision-making functions like determining compliance with KYC norms for opening
deposit accounts, giving sanction for loans (including retail loans), and management
of investment portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to however not outsource core management functions including internal audit, compliance function, and decision-making functions like determining complian

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval from rbi whether the service provider is located in or outside india
controls.control_description:
A bank which desires to outsource financial services, shall not require prior approval
from RBI whether the service provider is located in or outside India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval from rbi whether the service provider is located in or outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure diminish its obligations including to its customers and rbi, and those of its board and senior management, who have the ultimate responsibility for th
controls.control_description:
As stated in paragraph 9, the outsourcing of any activity by a bank shall not diminish
its obligations including to its customers and RBI, and those of its Board and Senior
Management, who have the ultimate responsibility for the outsourced activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to diminish its obligations including to its customers and rbi, and those of its board and senior management, who have the ultimate responsibility for th

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, be responsible for the actions of its service provider including <image> direct sales agents (dsas) / direct marketing agents (dmas) and
controls.control_description:
The
bank shall, therefore, be responsible for the actions of its service provider including
<image>
Direct Sales Agents (DSAs) / Direct Marketing Agents (DMAs) and recovery agents,
and the confidentiality of information pertaining to the customers that is available
with the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , therefore, be responsible for the actions of its service provider including <image> direct sales agents (dsas) / direct marketing agents (dmas) and

controls.control_objective: To ensure retain ultimate control of the outsourced activity
controls.control_description:
The bank shall retain ultimate control of the outsourced
activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to retain ultimate control of the outsourced activity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be owned or controlled by any director or officer / employee of the bank or their relatives having the same meaning as assigned under companies act, 2
controls.control_description:
(vi) the service provider, if not a subsidiary of the bank, shall not be owned or
controlled by any director or officer / employee of the bank or their relatives
having the same meaning as assigned under Companies Act, 2013 and the
Rules framed thereunder, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be owned or controlled by any director or officer / employee of the bank or their relatives having the same meaning as assigned under companies act, 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for making currency transactions reports (ctrs) and suspicious transactions reports (strs) to fiu or any other competent authority in r
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be responsible for making Currency Transactions Reports (CTRs) and
Suspicious Transactions Reports (STRs) to FIU or any other competent authority in
respect of its customer related activities carried out by the service providers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for making currency transactions reports (ctrs) and suspicious transactions reports (strs) to fiu or any other competent authority in r

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its board, which shall incorporate, inter alia, the following:
controls.control_description:
A bank intending to outsource any of its financial services shall put in place a
comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its Board, which shall incorporate,
inter alia, the following:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its board, which shall incorporate, inter alia, the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, be responsible for:
controls.control_description: The Senior Management of a bank shall, inter alia, be responsible for:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, be responsible for:

controls.control_objective: To ensure evaluate and guard against the following key risks when entering into outsourcing arrangements:
controls.control_description:
A bank shall evaluate and guard against the following key risks when entering into
outsourcing arrangements:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evaluate and guard against the following key risks when entering into outsourcing arrangements:

controls.control_objective: To ensure arise due to technology failure, fraud, error, or inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or to provide remedies
controls.control_description:
(iv) Operational Risk - which may arise due to technology failure, fraud, error, or
inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or to
provide remedies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arise due to technology failure, fraud, error, or inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or to provide remedies

controls.control_objective: To ensure arise when a bank becomes over reliant on one service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the activity back in-house
controls.control_description:
(vi) Exit Strategy Risk - may arise when a bank becomes over reliant on one
service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the
activity back in-house, or enters into contracts that make speedy exits
prohibitively expensive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arise when a bank becomes over reliant on one service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the activity back in-house

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the ability to enforce the contract with the service provider
controls.control_description:
(ix) Contractual Risk - where the bank may not have the ability to enforce the
contract with the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the ability to enforce the contract with the service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek to ensure the security, preservation, and protection of the customer information in the custody or possession of the service provider
controls.control_description:
A bank shall seek to ensure the security, preservation, and protection of the
customer information in the custody or possession of the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek to ensure the security, preservation, and protection of the customer information in the custody or possession of the service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on a 'need to know' basis, i
controls.control_description:
Access to customer information by a service provider or its staff shall be on a 'need
to know' basis, i.e., limited to those areas where the information is required in order
to perform the outsourced function.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on a 'need to know' basis, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclo
controls.control_description:
A bank shall review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its
service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclose
security breaches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclo

controls.control_objective: To ensure take care to build strong safeguards so that there is no comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets
controls.control_description:
In instances, where a service provider acts as an outsourcing agent for multiple
entities, the bank shall take care to build strong safeguards so that there is no
comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take care to build strong safeguards so that there is no comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that a service provider is able to isolate and clearly identify the bank's customer information, documents, records, and assets to protect the
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that a service provider is able to isolate and clearly identify the
bank's customer information, documents, records, and assets to protect the
confidentiality of the information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that a service provider is able to isolate and clearly identify the bank's customer information, documents, records, and assets to protect the

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately notify rbi in the event of breach of security and leakage of confidential customer related information
controls.control_description:
A bank shall immediately notify RBI in the event of breach of security and leakage
of confidential customer related information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to immediately notify rbi in the event of breach of security and leakage of confidential customer related information

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable to its customers for any damage
controls.control_description:
In these eventualities, the bank shall
be liable to its customers for any damage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable to its customers for any damage

controls.control_objective: To ensure perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply
controls.control_description:
A bank shall perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an
outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply
with obligations in the outsourcing agreement on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply

controls.control_description:
(viii) external factors like political, economic, social, and legal environment of the
jurisdiction in which the service provider operates and other events that may
impact data security and service performance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impact data security and service performance

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain independent reviews and market feedback on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence
controls.control_description:
Where possible, a bank shall obtain independent reviews and market feedback on
the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain independent reviews and market feedback on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence

controls.control_objective: To ensure also evaluate whether the systems of its service provider are compatible with those of the bank, and the acceptability of their standards of performan
controls.control_description:
A bank shall also evaluate whether the systems of its service provider are
compatible with those of the bank, and the acceptability of their standards of
performance including in the area of customer service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also evaluate whether the systems of its service provider are compatible with those of the bank, and the acceptability of their standards of performan

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the terms and conditions governing the outsourcing arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the bank's legal
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that the terms and conditions governing the outsourcing
arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the bank's
legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the terms and conditions governing the outsourcing arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the bank's legal

controls.control_objective: To ensure appropriately reckon the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or managing them
controls.control_description:
The agreement shall
appropriately reckon the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or
managing them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appropriately reckon the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or managing them

controls.control_description:
The bank shall ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently flexible
to allow it to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing, and the right
<image>
to intervene with appropriate measures to meet legal and regulatory obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently flexible to allow it to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing, and the right <imag

controls.control_description:
The
agreement shall also bring out the nature of legal relationship between the parties,
i.e., whether agent-principal or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also bring out the nature of legal relationship between the parties, i

controls.control_description: Some of the key provisions of the agreement shall include:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained even after the contract expires or gets terminated
controls.control_description:
(xi) provision that confidentiality of customers' information shall be maintained
even after the contract expires or gets terminated;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained even after the contract expires or gets terminated

controls.control_objective: To ensure have in place a management structure to monitor and control its outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with its service pr
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have in place a management structure to monitor and control its
outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with its service
provider contain provisions to address the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have in place a management structure to monitor and control its outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with its service pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain a central record of all material outsourcing of financial services for review by its board and senior management
controls.control_description:
A bank shall maintain a central record of all material outsourcing of financial services
for review by its Board and Senior Management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain a central record of all material outsourcing of financial services for review by its board and senior management

controls.control_description:
The records shall be updated
promptly, and half-yearly reviews shall be placed before the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be updated promptly, and half-yearly reviews shall be placed before the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess the adequacy of the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and managing the outsourcing arrangement, the bank's compliance with its ri
controls.control_description:
Regular audits, by either the internal auditors or external auditors of a bank, shall
assess the adequacy of the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and
managing the outsourcing arrangement, the bank's compliance with its risk
management framework, and the requirements of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess the adequacy of the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and managing the outsourcing arrangement, the bank's compliance with its ri

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at least on an annual basis, review the financial and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its ou
controls.control_description:
A bank shall, at least on an annual basis, review the financial and operational
condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its
outsourcing obligations.

controls.control_description:
Such due diligence reviews, which shall be based on all
available information about the service provider, shall highlight any deterioration or
breach in performance standards, confidentiality, and security, and in operational
resilience or business continuity preparedness.

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that reconciliation of transactions between itself and the service provider (or its subcontractors) is carried out in a timely manner
controls.control_description:
In
<image>
such cases, the bank shall ensure that reconciliation of transactions between itself
and the service provider (or its subcontractors) is carried out in a timely manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that reconciliation of transactions between itself and the service provider (or its subcontractors) is carried out in a timely manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the reconciliation is carried out as advised in rbi guidelines on 'outsourcing of cash management - reconciliation of transactions' dated
controls.control_description:
A
bank shall ensure that the reconciliation is carried out as advised in RBI guidelines
on 'Outsourcing of Cash Management - Reconciliation of Transactions' dated May
14, 2019, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure that the reconciliation is carried out as advised in rbi guidelines on 'outsourcing of cash management - reconciliation of transactions' dated

controls.control_objective: To ensure require its service provider to develop and establish a robust framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and recovery pr
controls.control_description:
A bank shall require its service provider to develop and establish a robust framework
for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and recovery
procedures.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to require its service provider to develop and establish a robust framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and recovery pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the service provider periodically tests the business continuity and recovery plan and may also consider occasional joint testing and recov
controls.control_description:
The bank shall ensure that the service provider periodically tests the
Business Continuity and Recovery Plan and may also consider occasional joint
testing and recovery exercises with its service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the service provider periodically tests the business continuity and recovery plan and may also consider occasional joint testing and recov

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the availability of alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity back in-house in an emergency, and t
controls.control_description:
In establishing a viable contingency plan, a bank shall consider the availability of
alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity
back in-house in an emergency, and the costs, time, and resources that would be
involved.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the availability of alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity back in-house in an emergency, and t

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the bank's information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse conditions o
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the bank's
information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse conditions
or termination of the agreement, all documents, records of transactions and
information with the service provider, and assets of the bank, can be removed from
the possession of the service provider (in order to continue its business operations),
or deleted, destroyed, or rendered unusable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the bank's information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse conditions o

controls.control_objective: To ensure retain an appropriate level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its bu
controls.control_description:
In order to mitigate the risk of unexpected termination of the outsourcing agreement,
or insolvency or liquidation of its service provider, a bank shall retain an appropriate
level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene
with appropriate measures to continue its business operations without incurring
prohibitive expenses and disruption in the operations of the bank and its services to
the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to retain an appropriate level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its bu

controls.control_description:
If the services of a service provider are terminated by a bank, then it shall:
<image>

controls.control_description:
(1) In a group structure, a bank may have back-office and service arrangements or
agreements with group entities such as sharing of premises, legal and other
professional services, hardware and software applications and centralized back-office
functions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have back-office and service arrangements or agreements with group entities such as sharing of premises, legal and other professional services, hardwa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identical to those for a non- related party
controls.control_description:
In principle,
the risk management practices to be adopted by a bank while outsourcing to a related
party (i.e., party within the group / conglomerate) shall be identical to those for a non-
related party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identical to those for a non- related party

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that these:
controls.control_description: (2) While entering into such arrangements, a bank shall ensure that these:

controls.control_description:
<image>
(3) A bank shall ensure that its ability to carry out its operations in a sound fashion
would not be affected, if premises or other services (such as IT systems and support
staff) provided by the group entities become unavailable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its ability to carry out its operations in a sound fashion would not be affected

controls.control_objective: To ensure take measures to ensure that the entity's identification is distinctly visible and clear to the customers
controls.control_description:

selling, the bank shall take measures to ensure that the entity's identification is
distinctly visible and clear to the customers.

controls.control_objective: To ensure mention nature of arrangement of the entity with the bank so that the customers are clear on the seller of the product
controls.control_description:
The marketing brochure used by the
group entity and verbal communication by its staff / agent in the bank's premises
shall mention nature of arrangement of the entity with the bank so that the
customers are clear on the seller of the product.

controls.control_description:

suggesting or giving tacit impression that it is in any way responsible for the

controls.control_description:
In principle, outsourcing arrangements shall only be entered into with parties
operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality agreements and clauses.

controls.control_description:
The overseas operations of a bank shall be governed by both, these Directions and
the host country guidelines, and in case there are differences, the more stringent of
the two shall prevail.

controls.control_description:
However, where there is any conflict, the host country
guidelines shall prevail.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prevail

controls.control_objective: To ensure affect the rights of its customers against the bank, including the ability of the customers to obtain redressal as applicable under relevant laws
controls.control_description:
Outsourcing arrangements entered into by a bank shall not affect the rights of its
customers against the bank, including the ability of the customers to obtain redressal
as applicable under relevant laws.

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate a clause in the corresponding product literature, and brochures, stating that services of the service provider, including in sales and mar
controls.control_description:
In cases where customers are required to deal with a service provider in the process
of dealing with a bank, the bank shall incorporate a clause in the corresponding
product literature, and brochures, stating that services of the service provider,
including in sales and marketing of the products, may be used.

The role of the
service provider may be indicated in broad terms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated in broad terms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have a robust grievance redressal mechanism that shall not be
compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i.e., responsibility for
redressal of customers' grievances related to outsourced services shall rest with the
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i

controls.control_description:
In case of microfinance loans, a declaration that, (i) the bank shall be
accountable for inappropriate behaviour of the employees of the service provider
<image>
and (ii) shall provide timely grievance redressal, shall be made in the loan
agreement, and in Fair Practices Code (FPC) displayed in its office, branch
premises, and its website.

controls.control_description:
In addition to the above,
(1) a bank shall constitute Grievance Redressal Machinery in accordance with the
provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Responsible
Business Conduct) Directions, 2025, and give wide publicity about it within the
bank through electronic and print media;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute grievance redressal machinery in accordance with the provisions of reserve bank of india (commercial banks - responsible business conduct)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made known and widely publicised
controls.control_description:
(2) the name and contact number of designated grievance redressal officer of the
bank shall be made known and widely publicised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made known and widely publicised

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that genuine grievances of customers are redressed promptly without involving delay
controls.control_description:
The designated officer shall
ensure that genuine grievances of customers are redressed promptly without
involving delay.

controls.control_description:
and
(3) the time frame fixed for responding to the complaints (maximum 30 days) shall
be placed on the bank's website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed on the bank's website

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to seek grievance redressal under the rbi's integrated ombudsman scheme, 2021
controls.control_description:
If a complaint is rejected wholly or partly by a
bank, and the complainant is not satisfied with the reply, or does not get any
reply within 30 days after the bank received the complaint, the complainant
shall have the option to seek grievance redressal under the RBI's Integrated
Ombudsman Scheme, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to seek grievance redressal under the rbi's integrated ombudsman scheme, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'it services' means it services / it enabled services /it activities
controls.control_description:
In this Chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'IT services' means IT services / IT enabled services /IT activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'it services' means it services / it enabled services /it activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the potential to significantly impact the bank's business operations
controls.control_description:
(i) if disrupted or compromised shall have the potential to significantly impact
the bank's business operations;

controls.control_objective: To ensure have material impact on the bank's customers in the event of any unauthorised access, loss, or theft of customer information
controls.control_description:
(ii) may have material impact on the bank's customers in the event of any
unauthorised access, loss, or theft of customer information;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have material impact on the bank's customers in the event of any unauthorised access, loss, or theft of customer information

controls.control_objective: To ensure provider of it services including entities related to the bank, or those which belong to the same group or conglomerate to which the bank belongs
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Service Provider' means provider of IT services including entities related to
the bank, or those which belong to the same group or conglomerate to which
the bank belongs.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be owned or controlled by any director, or key managerial personnel, or approver of the outsourcing arrangement of the bank, or their relatives
controls.control_description:
In addition to adhering to the requirements stipulated in subparagraphs (i) to (v) of
paragraph 18 of these Directions, a bank shall ensure that the service provider, if
not a group company, shall not be owned or controlled by any director, or key
managerial personnel, or approver of the outsourcing arrangement of the bank, or
their relatives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be owned or controlled by any director, or key managerial personnel, or approver of the outsourcing arrangement of the bank, or their relatives

controls.control_description:
The terms 'control', 'director', 'key managerial personnel', and
'relative' shall have the same meaning as assigned under the Companies Act, 2013
and the Rules framed thereunder from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned under the companies act, 2013 and the rules framed thereunder from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure an exception to the above requirement may be made with the approval of board or a committee of the board, followed by appropriate disclosure, oversigh
controls.control_description:

approval of Board or a Committee of the Board, followed by appropriate disclosure,
oversight and monitoring of such arrangements.

A bank shall evaluate the need for outsourcing of IT services based on a

commensurate processes to manage those risks.

controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that cyber incidents are reported to it by the service provider
without undue delay, so that an incident is reported by the bank to the RBI within six
hours of detection by the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that cyber incidents are reported to it by the service provider without undue delay, so that an incident is reported by the bank to the rbi wit

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board-approved it outsourcing policy incorporating, inter alia, the following:
controls.control_description:
A bank intending to outsource any of its IT services shall put in place a
comprehensive Board-approved IT outsourcing policy incorporating, inter alia, the
following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a risk management framework that comprehensively deals with the processes and responsibilities for identification, measurement, mitigatio
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place a risk management framework that comprehensively deals
with the processes and responsibilities for identification, measurement, mitigation,
management, and reporting of risks associated with such IT outsourcing
arrangements.

controls.control_objective: To ensure suitably document risk assessments with necessary approvals in line with the roles and responsibilities of the board of directors, senior management
controls.control_description:
A bank shall suitably document risk assessments with necessary approvals in line
with the roles and responsibilities of the Board of Directors, Senior Management,
and IT Function, and subject the same to internal and external quality assurance on
a periodic basis as determined by the Board-approved policy.

controls.control_description:
A bank shall effectively assess the impact of concentration risk posed by multiple
outsourcing arrangements to the same service provider and the concentration risk
posed by outsourcing critical or material functions to a limited number of service
providers.

controls.control_description:
A bank shall be responsible for the confidentiality, and integrity of data and
information pertaining to its customers that are available to the service provider.

controls.control_description:
In these eventualities, the bank shall
adhere to the extant instructions issued by RBI from time to time on Incident
Response and Recovery Management.

controls.control_description:
With regard to requirement that the data should not be combined or comingled, as
stipulated in paragraph 26, it would suffice if there is clear separation and isolation
of data (bank, and its customer specific data and information) to ensure that only
the personnel as authorised by the bank is able to access data that belongs to them
in a multi-tenant environment / architecture.

A bank should adopt a risk-based approach in conducting such due diligence
activities.

provisions specified in paragraph 33 of these Directions.

of the agreement shall appropriately reckon the criticality of the outsourced task to

controls.control_description:
In addition to the requirements specified in subparagraphs (i) to (vii) of paragraph
34, a bank shall also include at minimum (as applicable to the scope of Directions

services:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have in place a management structure to monitor and control its outsourced services
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have in place a management structure to monitor and control its
outsourced services.

controls.control_objective: To ensure include (as applicable to the scope of directions in this chapter), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the systems and resou
controls.control_description:
This shall include (as applicable to the scope of Directions in
this Chapter), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the
systems and resources, service availability, adherence to SLA requirements, and
incident response mechanism.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include (as applicable to the scope of directions in this chapter), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the systems and resou

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct regular audits (as applicable to the scope of directions in this chapter), of service providers (including subcontractors) with regard to the
controls.control_description:
A bank shall conduct regular audits (as applicable to the scope of Directions in this
Chapter), of service providers (including subcontractors) with regard to the service
outsourced by it.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted either by bank's internal or external auditors appointed to act on bank's behalf
controls.control_description:
Such audits may be conducted either by bank's internal or external
auditors appointed to act on bank's behalf.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted either by bank's internal or external auditors appointed to act on bank's behalf

controls.control_objective: To ensure be availing services from the same third-party service provider
controls.control_description:
While outsourcing various IT services, more than one RE may be availing services
from the same third-party service provider.

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt pooled (shared) audit
controls.control_description:
In such scenarios, in lieu of conducting
separate audits by individual REs of the common service provider, they may adopt
pooled (shared) audit.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the responsibility of res in ensuring that the audit requirements related to their respective contract with the service provider are met effectivel
controls.control_description:
However, in doing so, it shall be the responsibility of REs in
ensuring that the audit requirements related to their respective contract with the
service provider are met effectively.

controls.control_description:

compliance with laws and regulations.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined based on the nature and extent of risk, and impact on the bank from the outsourcing arrangements
controls.control_description:
The frequency of the audit shall be
determined based on the nature and extent of risk, and impact on the bank from the
outsourcing arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined based on the nature and extent of risk, and impact on the bank from the outsourcing arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed periodically by the senior management, and in case of any adverse development, the same shall be put up to the board for information
controls.control_description:
Reports on the monitoring and control activities shall be
reviewed periodically by the Senior Management, and in case of any adverse
development, the same shall be put up to the Board for information.

controls.control_objective: To ensure also rely upon globally recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu of conducting independent audits
controls.control_description:
A bank, depending upon the risk assessment, may also rely upon globally
recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu of
conducting independent audits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also rely upon globally recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu of conducting independent audits

controls.control_description:
However, this shall not absolve the bank of its
responsibility in ensuring assurance on the controls and procedures required to
safeguard data security (including availability of systems) at the service provider's
end.

controls.control_objective: To ensure periodically review the financial and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its obligations
controls.control_description:
A bank shall periodically review the financial and operational condition of the service
provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its obligations.

controls.control_description:
A bank shall adopt
risk-based approach in defining the periodicity.

controls.control_description:

highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards, confidentiality,
security, and operational resilience preparedness.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards, confidentiality, security, and operational resilience preparedness

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the service provider grants unrestricted and effective access to (a) data related to the outsourced services
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that the service provider grants unrestricted and effective
access to (a) data related to the outsourced services;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the service provider grants unrestricted and effective access to (a) data related to the outsourced services

controls.control_objective: To ensure create an inventory of it services outsourced to service providers (including key entities involved in their supply chains)
controls.control_description:
A bank shall create an inventory of IT services outsourced to service providers
(including key entities involved in their supply chains).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to create an inventory of it services outsourced to service providers (including key entities involved in their supply chains)

controls.control_objective: To ensure map its dependency on third parties and periodically evaluate the information received from the service providers
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank shall map
its dependency on third parties and periodically evaluate the information received
from the service providers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to map its dependency on third parties and periodically evaluate the information received from the service providers

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply, mutatis mutandis, to outsourcing of it services
controls.control_description:
The Directions regarding 'Business Continuity and Management of Disaster
Recovery Plan' as applicable to outsourcing of financial services contained in
paragraph 40 to paragraph 43 shall apply, mutatis mutandis, to outsourcing of IT
services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply, mutatis mutandis, to outsourcing of it services

controls.control_objective: To ensure be commensurate with the nature and scope of the outsourced service as per extant instructions issued by rbi from time to time on bcp / dr requirement
controls.control_description:
The Business Continuity Plan (BCP) and Disaster Recovery Plan (DRP)
for outsourced IT services shall be commensurate with the nature and scope of the
outsourced service as per extant instructions issued by RBI from time to time on
BCP / DR requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be commensurate with the nature and scope of the outsourced service as per extant instructions issued by rbi from time to time on bcp / dr requirement

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain a clear exit strategy for ensuring business continuity during and after exit
controls.control_description:
The IT outsourcing policy shall contain a clear exit strategy for ensuring business
continuity during and after exit.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to contain a clear exit strategy for ensuring business continuity during and after exit

controls.control_objective: To ensure include plans for different scenarios of exit or termination of services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary
controls.control_description:
The strategy shall include plans for different scenarios of exit or termination of
services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include plans for different scenarios of exit or termination of services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, identify alternative arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service provider, or by the bank itself
controls.control_description:
In documenting its exit strategy, a bank shall, inter alia, identify alternative
arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service
provider, or by the bank itself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, identify alternative arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service provider, or by the bank itself

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on safe removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical), as
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on safe
removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical), as
applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on safe removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical), as

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the service provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any data during the transition period
controls.control_description:
Further, the outsourcing agreement shall ensure that the service
provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any data
during the transition period, unless specifically advised by the regulator or the
concerned bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the service provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any data during the transition period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be legally obliged to cooperate fully with both the bank and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition
controls.control_description:
A service provider shall be legally obliged to cooperate fully with both the bank and
its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be legally obliged to cooperate fully with both the bank and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given due publicity by the bank so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing with the concerned service provider
controls.control_description:
In the event of termination of the outsourcing agreement for any reason in cases
where the service provider deals with the customers of the bank, the same shall be
given due publicity by the bank so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing with
the concerned service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given due publicity by the bank so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing with the concerned service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure such an arrangement is backed by the board-approved policy and appropriate slas / agreements with its group entities are in place
controls.control_description:
A bank may outsource any IT service within its business group / conglomerate,
provided that such an arrangement is backed by the Board-approved policy and
appropriate SLAs / agreements with its group entities are in place.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to such an arrangement is backed by the board-approved policy and appropriate slas / agreements with its group entities are in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on objective reasons that are similar to selection of a third-party, and the bank shall appropriately deal with any conflicts of interest tha
controls.control_description:
The selection of a group entity shall be based on objective reasons that are similar
to selection of a third-party, and the bank shall appropriately deal with any conflicts
of interest that such an outsourcing arrangement may entail.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on objective reasons that are similar to selection of a third-party, and the bank shall appropriately deal with any conflicts of interest tha

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with its group entities
controls.control_description:
A bank, at all times, shall maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with its
group entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with its group entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identical to those specified for a non-related party
controls.control_description:
Risk management practices being adopted by the bank while
outsourcing to a group entity shall be identical to those specified for a non-related
party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identical to those specified for a non-related party

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be entered into with parties operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality clauses and agreements
controls.control_description:
In principle, outsourcing arrangements shall only be entered into with parties
operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality clauses and agreements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be entered into with parties operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality clauses and agreements

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the following requirements in the case of outsourcing of soc operations in addition to the controls prescribed in this chapter: definition, cust
controls.control_description:
Considering the risks associated with outsourcing of Security Operations Centre
(SOC) operations by a bank, such as data being stored and processed at an external
location and managed by the service provider (or its subcontractors) to which the
bank has lesser visibility, the bank, to mitigate the risks, shall adopt the following
requirements in the case of outsourcing of SOC operations in addition to the controls
prescribed in this Chapter:
definition, customisation and related data / logs, meta-data and analytics
(specific to the bank);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the following requirements in the case of outsourcing of soc operations in addition to the controls prescribed in this chapter: definition, cust

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in addition to other applicable provisions in these directions:
controls.control_description:
Considering the varied services, benefits, and risk profiles associated with the cloud
deployment and service models, a bank that uses cloud services for storage,
computing and movement of data in cloud environments shall, in addition to other
applicable provisions in these Directions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in addition to other applicable provisions in these directions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration, consulting, m
controls.control_description:
Such
assessment shall include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads of
cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration,
consulting, migration, and projected recurring expenditure depending on the
nature of workloads.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration, consulting, m

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined based on a duly conducted business technology risk assessment
controls.control_description:
The extent of cloud adoption may vary, ranging from
migration of non-business critical workloads to the cloud, to deployment of
<image>
critical business applications such as SaaS, or other combinations in between,
and shall be determined based on a duly conducted business technology risk
assessment;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined based on a duly conducted business technology risk assessment

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that specified procedures are consistent with business needs, and legal and regulatory requirements
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that specified procedures are consistent with business needs, and legal and regulatory requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to, inter alia, nist sp 800- 210 general access control guidance for cloud systems https://nvlpubs
controls.control_description:
For cloud security best practices, a bank may refer to, inter alia, NIST SP 800-
210 General Access Control Guidance for Cloud Systems
https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/SpecialPublications/NIST.SP.800-210.pdf
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to refer to, inter alia, nist sp 800- 210 general access control guidance for cloud systems https://nvlpubs

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia
controls.control_description:
Such a policy shall, inter
alia,
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into a contract only with csps that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements and the rights available thereunder to
controls.control_description:
A bank shall enter into a contract only with CSPs that
are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements and the
rights available thereunder to the bank, including those relating to aspects such
as data storage, data protection, and confidentiality;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into a contract only with csps that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements and the rights available thereunder to

controls.control_objective: To ensure :
controls.control_description: The technology architecture shall:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to :

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be a part of the service level stipulations in sla
controls.control_description:
and
unambiguous definition of liabilities, damages, penalties and
indemnities, which should also be a part of the service level
stipulations in SLA;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be a part of the service level stipulations in sla

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions,
instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall
continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
